_notes.purpose: RE metadata source-of-truth, anchored to constants/AOBs (Path C) not addresses, so it survives ~biweekly LoL recompiles. resolved_address fields are cache/telemetry only, NEVER a key.
_notes.provenance_rule: resolved_address, signature.byte_sig, signature.cfg, vars.db_state, anchors.constants, anchors.runtime_signature = DB-measured. metadata.name/prototype/comment, vars.proposed, role/identity labels = inference.
_notes.anchor_finding: string/reflection-name anchors reach the skin RENDERER side; the CharacterStackData mutation path (0x40e8/0x1314, Update fn) is only reachable by feeding signatures.rs AOBs into search_bytes.
_notes.shared_source_of_truth: signature.byte_sig / anchors.runtime_signature use the same masked-AOB form as WildSkin-rs/src/memory/signatures.rs — the byte pattern is simultaneously the runtime scanner's locator and the BN re-anchor key.

metadata.name: register_GetUnitSkinID
metadata.comment: Static-init registrar: builds name 'GetUnitSkinID' (qword 0x5374696e55746547 = 'GetUnitS' + strncpy 'kinID') and registers accessor fn-ptr sub_1401f65f0 into script-binding registry data_141ed6d50. PROPOSED name; DB has it stripped as sub_1400b3fd0.

db_state.note: No parameter-category vars in DB; effectively void(void). Locals are BN auto-names (var_98,var_68,var_60,var_5c...,result,rax_1,rcx_1).

metadata.name: ApplyRelativeTeamColors_AllSubmeshes
metadata.comment: Per-object team-color apply: iterates model/skin vector at this+0x1370..+0x1378, loads relative team color per entry via sub_1403f4900, logs fmt string on failure, then FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' anim bind. PROPOSED name; DB has it stripped as sub_140e3c940. Sibling single-target variant is sub_14029b400 (shares fmt string).

cfg.loops_note: back-edge count; primary do-while over model vector + 1 inner refcount loop

string_xrefs: Failed to load relative team color for skin: %s and skinID: %i
anchors.string_xref_ambiguous: fmt string alone -> {sub_140e3c940, sub_14029b400}; disambiguated below
anchors.disambiguator: MRE::FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' present here, absent in sibling sub_14029b400
anchors.constants_note: project 0x40e8/0x1314 NOT present in this function

db_state.note: 1 parameter-category var in DB. Remaining are BN auto reg-temporaries (rax_1..rax_16, rcx_1..rcx_12, i, i_1, arg_8...).

last_resolved.score_note: primary fmt-string anchor ambiguous (2 candidates); named-call MRE::FAddClassDep + 'Idle1' string reduce to 1

metadata.name: CharacterDataStack::Update
metadata.comment: THE skin-apply mutation fn. Runtime calls update(true) to apply base_skin.skin. Matches signatures.rs UPDATE_FN_SIG (entry prologue) AND character_data.rs UpdateFn exactly; DB arg count (2: this, change) confirms the ABI. PROPOSED name; DB stripped as sub_140210460.

cfg.note: large/complex fn; block count from full basic-blocks dump. Update is the heavy per-apply routine.

db_state.note: 2 params — matches UpdateFn(this, change:bool). Locals are BN auto temporaries.

metadata.name: CharacterObject_set_model_and_skin
metadata.comment: change_skin-adjacent: references the CharacterDataStack at this+0x40e8 (&arg1[0x81d]) and forwards 17 fields to the emplace/build helper sub_14022aee0. Hosts the 'lea rcx,[rbp+0x40e8]' the runtime scrapes for FieldOffsets.character_data_stack. PROPOSED name/role (not asserted to be change_skin); DB stripped as sub_1402a3a20.

cfg.note: not fetched to avoid a second large dump; HLIL shows 1 primary refcount loop + a submesh iteration loop.

runtime_signature.match: unique (1 hit for the dewildcarded 48 8D 8D E8 40 00 00 44 8B 8C 24)

params.note: 18 params total; arg2..arg18 forwarded to sub_14022aee0

db_state.note: 18 params. Names BN auto; types BN-inferred.

metadata.name: CharacterStackData_field_init
metadata.prototype: uint64_t sub_14026c540(int32_t* out, char* modelA, int32_t* p3, char* modelB, int32_t skin, char gear, void* p7, int32_t p8, int64_t p9)
metadata.comment: CharacterStackData field-initializer/setter. Hosts 'mov [rsi+0x1314],al' — the skin_id byte write the runtime scrapes for FieldOffsets.skin_id. PROPOSED name/role; DB stripped as sub_14026c540.

cfg.note: loops = inlined string-copy self-loops; edges/loops counted from full basic-blocks dump

anchors.constants_note: raw 0x1314 also present at sibling sub_140334000 (rejected by full-sig discriminator)
